aeo_readiness.summary: The business has some foundational elements for AEO readiness but lacks critical optimizations in content, reviews, and local SEO.
quick_wins: Add a descriptive and keyword-rich title tag to improve search engine visibility.
Encourage customers to leave Google reviews to build credibility and improve local search rankings.
Optimize website content with location-specific keywords to target the Aurora, CO market more effectively.

gbp_analysis.found: The business has a physical presence in Aurora, CO, but lacks structured Google Business Profile (GBP) information.
gbp_analysis.summary: The absence of a GBP limits the business's visibility in local search results and misses opportunities for customer engagement.
critical_issues: Lack of customer reviews and ratings on Google.

nap_citations.summary: The business name, address, and phone number (NAP) are present on the website but need consistent citations across directories.
action_items: Ensure NAP consistency across all online directories and platforms.
List the business in local directories and industry-specific platforms.
Verify and update NAP information on the website to match directory listings.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of customer reviews and GBP listing severely impacts local search visibility.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Users searching for HVAC services in Aurora, CO on Google Maps and local search results.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Creating and optimizing a GBP listing and actively managing customer reviews.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Establishing the business as a local authority by publishing relevant, high-quality content on the blog and engaging with the local community.
